title: Spiritual Varanasi
shortDescription: Experience the divine energy of the world's oldest living city.
overview: Witness the mesmerizing Ganga Aarti, take a sunrise boat ride on the holy river, and explore the ancient alleys of Varanasi and Buddhist ruins in Sarnath.

itinerary.title: Varanasi & Sarnath
itinerary.description: Morning boat ride, temple visits, and excursion to Sarnath.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Morning shopping for Banarasi silk, transfer to airport.
